# GitHub Repository Profile

Use the following values for the GitHub repository sidebar.

## About

Cross-device AR spray creation and discovery scaffold for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro with identity, nearby discovery, brush modeling, moderation, simulator, and Mac Builder workflow.

## Website

https://jishengyang-cal.github.io/spatial-spray/

- visionos

- realitykit
- spatial-computing
- ar
- ugc
- location-based
- typescript
